creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

Update to 2.9.3:

diff -r -u -N databases/cego/Makefile /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile
--- databases/cego/Makefile	2011-05-28 23:04:42.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile	2011-06-12 19:46:55.000000000 +0200
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/databases/cego/Makefile,v 1.20 2011/05/28 07:16:21 culot Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	cego
-PORTVERSION=	2.8.5
+PORTVERSION=	2.9.3
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lemke-it.com/
 
diff -r -u -N databases/cego/distinfo /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo
--- databases/cego/distinfo	2011-05-28 23:04:42.000000000 +0200
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo	2011-06-12 19:47:06.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cego-2.8.5.tar.gz) = c2180e761e4c9bc6cf4d675113125445058b5135766f0b373b165055ecbf9bff
-SIZE (cego-2.8.5.tar.gz) = 643299
+SHA256 (cego-2.9.3.tar.gz) = 905263032fc2a65c893355d729bdc309e676d595f309254100ca2ee3d31d20a6
+SIZE (cego-2.9.3.tar.gz) = 649669
